description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure dressed in tactical attire, featuring a black balaclava that covers the entire head except for the eyes. He wears a heavy, padded tactical vest with multiple pouches and a pair of fingerless gloves. His arms are exposed, showing defined muscles and tattoos, while his lower body is clad in camouflage-patterned cargo pants. A holstered sidearm is attached to his right thigh, and he wears sturdy, reinforced combat boots. The overall appearance suggests a paramilitary or special operations background, suitable for high-risk urban environments.
description: A muscular adult male in tactical gear with a balaclava, armored vest, camouflage pants, and combat boots.
description_view_0: Front view shows the balaclava, tactical vest, muscular arms, gloves, and holstered weapon.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the holstered sidearm, arm tattoos, and the profile of the tactical vest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, camouflage pants, and the back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm tattoos and the side profile of the gear.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical vest, balaclava, fingerless gloves, cargo pants, and reinforced combat boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
